ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "hhx" INTEGER /* Household identifier */,
  "fmx" INTEGER /* Family member identifier */,
  "fpx" INTEGER /* Family member person identifier */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex (1 for male, 2 for female) */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index */,
  "sleep" INTEGER /* Average hours of sleep */,
  "education" INTEGER /* Education level */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the individual */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption habits of the individual */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hhx", "fmx", "fpx")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "hhx" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the household */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the household is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the household is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the household */,
  "number_of_occupants" INTEGER /* Number of people living in the household */,
  "house_type" TEXT /* Type of house (e.g., Apartment, Single Family Home) */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Household income bracket */,
  "household_size" TEXT /* Household size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hhx")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_members" (
  "fmx" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family member */,
  "hhx" INTEGER /* Reference to the household */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the family member */,
  "relation" TEXT /* Relationship to the head of household */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the family member */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the family member */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the family member */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the family member */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption habits of the family member */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the family member */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the family member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fmx", "hhx")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "fpx" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual's health data */,
  "hhx" INTEGER /* Reference to the household */,
  "fmx" INTEGER /* Reference to the family member */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index */,
  "sleep" INTEGER /* Average hours of sleep */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate */,
  "blood_pressure_systolic" INTEGER /* Systolic blood pressure */,
  "blood_pressure_diastolic" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure */,
  "cholesterol_level" INTEGER /* Cholesterol level */,
  "glucose_level" INTEGER /* Glucose level */,
  "physical_activity_level" TEXT /* Physical activity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fpx", "hhx", "fmx")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "fpx" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual's demographic data */,
  "hhx" INTEGER /* Reference to the household */,
  "fmx" INTEGER /* Reference to the family member */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex (1 for male, 2 for female) */,
  "education" INTEGER /* Education level */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the individual */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption habits of the individual */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fpx", "hhx", "fmx")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "fpx" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual */,
  "hhx" INTEGER /* Reference to the household */,
  "fmx" INTEGER /* Reference to the family member */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of the health record */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index at the time of the record */,
  "sleep" INTEGER /* Average hours of sleep at the time of the record */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate at the time of the record */,
  "blood_pressure_systolic" INTEGER /* Systolic blood pressure at the time of the record */,
  "blood_pressure_diastolic" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure at the time of the record */,
  "cholesterol_level" INTEGER /* Cholesterol level at the time of the record */,
  "glucose_level" INTEGER /* Glucose level at the time of the record */,
  "physical_activity_level" TEXT /* Physical activity level at the time of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_fpx FOREIGN KEY ("fpx") REFERENCES family_members ("fpx"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_hhx FOREIGN KEY ("hhx") REFERENCES households ("hhx"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_fmx FOREIGN KEY ("fmx") REFERENCES family_members ("fmx")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "fpx" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual */,
  "hhx" INTEGER /* Reference to the household */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_fpx FOREIGN KEY ("fpx") REFERENCES family_members ("fpx"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_hhx FOREIGN KEY ("hhx") REFERENCES households ("hhx")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the research study */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the research study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the research study */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the study */,
  "research_outcomes" TEXT /* Outcomes of the research study */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the research study was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)
